data.title: SpaceX Warns Investors Of Chip Supply Risks As Elon Musk Targets In-House GPUs
data.description: SpaceX, a leading commercial space flight company, has cautioned investors about potential supply chain risks as it expands its in-house AI computing operations. According to S-1 filings reviewed by Reuters, SpaceX identified its in-house chip manufacturing as a significant capital expenditure. The company mentioned the absence of long-term supplier contracts and its ongoing reliance on third-party suppliers for a considerable portion of its computing needs. SpaceX expressed uncertainty about achieving its objectives related to TERAFAB within the expected timelines. The news also mentioned an upcoming environmental protest at Starbase as investors visited SpaceX ahead of its IPO. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Helix and Hornbeck to Combine to Create a Premier Integrated Offshore Services Company
data.description: In Houston and Covington, Louisiana, Helix Energy Solutions Group, Inc. ("Helix") (NYSE: HLX) and Hornbeck Offshore Services, Inc. ("Hornbeck") have announced a merger through an all-stock deal, creating a leading integrated offshore services entity. The agreement will result in Hornbeck shareholders owning about 55% and Helix shareholders owning around 45% of the new combined company post-transaction.

data.title: Corpower Ocean AB: Why Wave Energy Must Be the UK's Next Great Green Frontier
data.description: In London on April 23, 2026, it was disclosed that the UK, an island nation with over 11,000 miles of coastline, has access to a significant but often neglected renewable energy source: ocean waves. While offshore wind energy has been the focus of Britain's clean energy efforts for many years, the potential of harnessing ocean waves is now being recognized.

data.title: Sam Bankman-Fried Highlights How His Early Bets In Anthropic, SpaceX, Cursor Could Have Skyrocketed If Not Liquidated
data.description: Imprisoned individual Sam Bankman-Fried, known as SBF, recently discussed his investments in top companies, which could have had a significant total stake if a fire-sale had not taken place. SBF mentioned Alameda Research's pre-seed investment in the AI coding tool Cursor, as the startup is close to securing $2 billion in fresh capital at a $50 billion pre-money valuation. FTX and its related companies, under SBF, had investments in various startups, including Anthropic, Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ: HOOD), K5 Global (with investments in SpaceX and Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) projects. FTX's bankruptcy resulted in the sale of most of these assets. SBF shared an image indicating the potential worth of FTX's top holdings if the fire-sale hadn't occurred.

data.title: Haptiq Releases AI Workflow Capabilities for Global Private Equity Platform
data.description: In a recent announcement from New York, Haptiq has introduced advanced AI workflow features within Olympus™. These new capabilities aim to assist private equity firms in streamlining their processes, speeding up decision-making, and accessing valuable portfolio insights. This development is set to revolutionize how PE firms operate by incorporating automation and intelligence into their workflows.

data.title: Mobileye Announces Share Repurchase Program of Up to $250 Million
data.description: In Jerusalem, Mobileye Global Inc. (Nasdaq: MBLY) has revealed a new initiative to buy back $250 million of its Class A common stock. The Repurchase Program was approved by the Board of Directors, showcasing their trust in the company's existing products and its role as a frontrunner in advanced driver assistance systems and self-driving technology.

data.title: REPLY S.p.A.: Shareholders’ Meeting Approves the 2025 Financial Statements
data.description: In Turin, Italy, the General Shareholders’ meeting of Reply S.p.A. [stock symbols EXM, STAR: REY] has confirmed the Financial Statements for the financial year 2025. They approved the distribution of a gross dividend of €1.35 per share. This dividend is set to be paid on 20 May 2026, with the dividend date scheduled for 18 May 2026 and the record date on 19 May 2026. The Reply Group wrapped up the 2025 financial year with a consolidated turnover of €2,483.6 million.

data.title: US Federal Court Rules MEDDPICC is a Generic Term, Orders Cancellation of Trademark Registration
data.description: In a recent ruling on the case of MEDDICC Ltd. vs. 01 Consulting LLC, the court has upheld MEDDPICC as a sales methodology available for unrestricted use within the US industry. The decision was made by the United States District Court for the Eastern District of Pennsylvania on April 23, 2026. This verdict solidifies MEDDPICC's status as a free and open methodology for sales practices in the US. The ruling is expected to have a significant impact on businesses and professionals utilizing this approach.

data.title: M31 Collaborates with TSMC to Achieve Tapeout of eUSB2V2 on N2P Process, Advancing Design IP Ecosystem
data.description: On April 23, 2026, in Hsinchu, M31 Technology (M31), a leading global silicon IP provider, revealed during the TSMC 2026 North America Technology Symposium that their eUSB2V2 interface IP has successfully undergone tapeout on TSMC's N2P process. This milestone marks a significant achievement for M31, showcasing their commitment to innovation in the semiconductor industry. The completion of tapeout on TSMC's N2P process underscores M31's dedication to staying at the forefront of technology advancements.

data.title: Resolutions at the Annual General Meeting in HMS Networks
data.description: HMS Networks AB (publ) convened its Annual General Meeting on April 23, 2026. During the meeting, all matters put forth aligning with proposals from the Board of Directors and the Nomination Committee garnered approval. Key resolutions passed include the endorsement of important agenda items.
